objective: Repair the pre-cut RESEARCH_WORKER route so the frozen DeepSeek Pro binding returns visible bounded JSON instead of spending the entire output allowance on hidden reasoning, then rebuild the exact connected-worker image and rerun only the invalidated two-role proof under a new provider-profile identity.

sequential_owner_lanes.mutation: Set only deepseek-v4-pro request_options.thinking.type from enabled to disabled in the immutable-shape profile and its exact implementation mirror; keep model, endpoint, role, family, provenance, privacy, budget, retry and authority semantics unchanged.

Rebind the connected-worker runtime policy to the new exact provider-profile and shadow-tool hashes and update only the directly invalidated request-codec assertion. Agent 5 receives no tools or provenance authority.

acceptance_commands: git diff proves each commit remains within its canonical owner write set
no-cache linux/arm64 connected-worker image build from exact repair head
exact worker image dependency hashes match runtime-policy.json
fresh private envelope binds the new provider profile worker image rendered config and two-call budget
one RESEARCH_WORKER and one cross-family CRITIC_DEEP call succeed and form the bounded proposal envelope
every new commit parses PLAN-ID PLAN-VERSION AMENDMENT-ID SPRINT-ID as one contiguous trailer block
repair merge-head and receipt-head exact-head CI are green
stop_conditions: model endpoint role family provenance privacy budget retry or authority semantics change
old UNKNOWN call is replayed or raw bytes enter Git
candidate becomes non-null before the repaired pre-cut gate passes
force push rebase history rewrite or live action
rollback: Before candidate cut, additively revert only the R08B-R3 profile/policy/test bytes; preserve both private UNKNOWN attempts and all remote history.
